data.description: Management in Zealand Pharma reported 65 transactions of shares and related securities.

data.title: Bitcoin's halving cycle sees only 97% gains, the weakest ever, compared to over 761% in past cycles. Volatility at 1.75% hints at a significant change.
data.description: Galaxy's Alex Thorn has highlighted Bitcoin's current halving cycle as the weakest ever, with gains limited to 97% compared to over 761% seen in previous cycles. The volatility stands at 1.75%, indicating a significant structural shift in the market.

data.title: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev Opened Up About What Success Means To Him And The Legacy He Would Be 'Excited' To Tell His Grandkids
data.description: Robinhood Markets Inc.'s CEO, Vlad Tenev, of NASDAQ: HOOD, believes that success is about generating significantly more value for the world than for oneself. Tenev emphasized the importance of having "skin in the game" during his appearance on The Knowledge Project Podcast on March 3. He expressed that he would be content if the overall impact on the world surpasses his personal gains. Tenev aims to promote widespread ownership to ensure everyone is actively involved. His vision includes a future where a larger portion of the U.S. population owns key industries, fostering a more educated and engaged society. For more details, check out the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: TEAMSTERS AT UNIVERSITY OF CHICAGO MEDICAL CENTER TO HOLD TWO-DAY PRACTICE PICKET
data.description: A group of 2,000 Teamsters are calling for a fair contract at a significant hospital in Chicago. The workers, who are part of the University of Chicago Medical Center (UCMC) and represented by Teamsters Local 743, will begin a two-day practice picket on Monday, April 20 at 5 a.m. The picket is aimed at highlighting the workers' demands for better working conditions.

data.title: In HelloNation, Criminal Defense Attorney Mitchell A. Stone, P.A. Explains Plea Deals
data.description: Jacksonville, Florida - On April 19, 2026, an informative article titled "What Is a Plea Deal?" discusses the implications of a plea deal on a defendant's future. The piece features defense attorney Mitchell A. Stone, P.A., who operates in Jacksonville. The article delves into the significance of plea deals and how they can influence a defendant's legal situation. Attorney Stone provides valuable insights on the subject, shedding light on this crucial aspect of the legal process.
Zealand Pharma introduces incentive programs for Board, Management, and employees for 2026.

data.title: BTC halving cycles showing 'dramatic' underperformance in 2024, with decreasing volatility and upside. Analyst suggests dynamics may change over time.
data.description: Alex Thorn from Galaxy believes that the volatility and potential for gains have decreased after each Bitcoin halving cycle. However, Thorn suggests that this shift in dynamics may not be permanent.

data.title: Kelp DAO breach leads to $291M theft and $6.2B withdrawal panic on Aave, causing DeFi users to face liquidity issues.
data.description: Following a security breach, hackers were able to siphon off $291 million worth of cryptocurrency from the infrastructure associated with Kelp DAO. Subsequently, users of decentralized finance (DeFi) platform Aave encountered difficulties in withdrawing their funds.

data.title: SIRUI Wins "Best of Show", Unveils New Cine Lenses at NAB Show 2026
data.description: At the 2026 NAB Show in Las Vegas on April 19, SIRUI was honored with a "Best of Show" award for its Vision Prime T1.4 Full-Frame Cine Lens Series. Additionally, SIRUI unveiled new focal lengths for the Vision Prime and IronStar lens families. This expansion includes a range of choices for filmmakers and videographers looking to enhance their creative projects.

data.title: AST SpaceMobile Addresses Today’s Orbital Launch of BlueBird 7 on the New Glenn Launch Vehicle
data.description: In MIDLAND, Texas, AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTS) has announced the successful launch of BlueBird 7 on the New Glenn launch vehicle. However, during the New Glenn 3 mission, BlueBird 7 was positioned into a lower orbit than intended by the launch vehicle's upper stage. AST SpaceMobile is pioneering the creation of a revolutionary space-based cellular broadband network, accessible directly via everyday smartphones for commercial and government use. The incident during the launch will require further assessment and potential adjustments.
Sam Altman-Founded World Network Bottlenecked By Nvidia Chips: Tools For Humanity Executive Says, 'Once We Have A Lot Of These Orbs....'

data.title: Insta360 Previews New Luna Series and Major Updates at NAB Show 2026
data.description: Insta360, a prominent player in cutting-edge imaging technology, has officially debuted its latest offerings at the 2026 NAB Show in Las Vegas on April 19. The showcase highlighted a variety of new products, bundles, and software updates, giving attendees a glimpse of the upcoming product line. This event marks a significant milestone for Insta360 as they continue to push the boundaries of innovation in the industry.

data.title: Revolution Medicines to Present Updated Phase 1 Clinical Data for Zoldonrasib in Patients with Previously Treated KRAS G12D Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer at the 2026 AACR Annual Meeting
data.description: Revolution Medicines, Inc., based in Redwood City, California, and listed as RVMD on Nasdaq, shared updated data on their Phase 1 clinical trial (RMC-9805-001) for zoldonrasib, an oral RAS(ON) G12D-selective inhibitor. This trial focused on patients with previously treated KRAS G12D non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). The results were presented during the official press program at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting. A plenary oral presentation on these findings is scheduled for April 19, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. PDT.

data.title: Kelp DAO exploit hits DeFi - $293M loss spreads to 9 protocols. rsETH drops 23% amid concerns over lending risks.
data.description: A significant incident involving a hack related to kelp liquid restaking spread across various DeFi platforms including Aave, Compound, and 7 others. This led to a substantial 23% drop in the value of rsETH. The industry is currently engaged in discussions about the isolated risks associated with lending in the decentralized finance sector.

data.title: Bitcoin Hits $78,000 As 46 Days Of Short Positions Face Potential Short Squeeze
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) has surged by 5% after surpassing the descending trendline that had been in place since the bear trend started from $128,000. This breakthrough has triggered short-squeeze conditions. The previous instance of this squeeze occurred in November to December 2022 during the FTX collapse. Analyst Vetle Lunde from K33 mentioned that traders had been actively establishing short positions and betting against a breakout, thus increasing the likelihood of a short squeeze if the upward momentum continues. In such a scenario, traders who had bet against the rally would face escalating losses, potentially leading to a rush to buy back positions all at once, resulting in a significant surge in prices due to the cascading short squeeze. The longer this situation persists, the greater the potential for a significant unwinding of positions. Additionally, banking giant Goldman Sachs (GS) made a notable move by filing for a Bitcoin ETF this week, marking its initial direct foray into the crypto space.

data.title: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On ManpowerGroup After Q1 Results
data.description: ManpowerGroup (NYSE: MAN) announced strong first quarter earnings, surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported earnings of 51 cents per share, exceeding the estimated 49 cents per share. Additionally, quarterly sales were reported at $4.510 billion, surpassing the expected $4.414 billion. Looking ahead, ManpowerGroup anticipates second-quarter GAAP EPS to range between 91 cents to $1.05, compared to market estimates of 96 cents. CEO Jonas Prising attributed the success to disciplined execution and improving demand trends, marking five consecutive quarters of revenue growth. This growth was supported by an expanded pipeline, sustained momentum in the Manpower brand, and operational efficiencies resulting from SG&A reductions. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Citizens Financial Analysts Raise Their Forecasts After Better-Than-Expected Q1 Earnings
data.description: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE: CFG) announced strong first-quarter earnings, surpassing expectations. The company reported earnings of $1.13 per share, exceeding the estimated $1.09 per share. Quarterly sales reached $2.168 billion, higher than the anticipated $2.163 billion. Chairman and CEO Bruce Van Saun expressed satisfaction with the performance despite global uncertainties. The financial results showed impressive year-over-year EPS growth of 47%, operational leverage of 7%, NIM expansion of 7 bps sequentially and 24 bps compared to the previous year, and a solid balance sheet position. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: These Analysts Revise Their Forecasts On U.S. Bancorp After Q1 Results
data.description: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) released positive first-quarter 2026 results, exceeding expectations. The bank reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.18 in Q1, surpassing the estimated $1.14. Quarterly sales stood at $7.288 billion, above the expected $7.277 billion. CEO Gunjan Kedia attributed the positive 440 basis points of operating leverage to robust revenue growth, with ongoing investments and cost savings leading to a 260 basis points improvement in the efficiency ratio compared to the previous year. For the upcoming second quarter, U.S. Bancorp anticipates a 6%-7% growth in net interest income and fees. The bank also forecasts a full-year revenue increase of 4%-6% with over 200 basis points of operating leverage. Consequently, U.S. Bancorp shares saw a 3.4% rise in response to these results.

data.title: Lundbeck presents new data at AAN 2026 highlighting real-world changes in migraine-related cognitive symptoms after starting VYEPTI® (eptinezumab)
data.description: A recent study called INFUSE conducted in VALBY, Denmark, focused on analyzing patient-reported cognitive symptoms related to migraines. The study observed participants over one year, tracking any changes in symptoms over a six-month period. The participants included individuals who had experienced at least one previous treatment failure with anti-calcitonin gene-related peptide (anti-CGRP) medications. This research, conducted by H. Lundbeck, offers valuable insights into the cognitive aspects of migraines among patients, highlighting the importance of understanding and addressing such symptoms in clinical practice.

data.title: 8.2 BTC, over $600,000 tied to $9B Bitfinex hack in 2016, shifted by US government.
data.description: Recently, the U.S. government transferred 8.2 Bitcoin, valued at over $600,000, associated with the Bitfinex hack in 2016, which involved a staggering $9 billion.
